ingredients.name: Kiyomizu-dera
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kyoto's iconic wooden terrace temple is the direct architectural model for Kyoto Jujutsu Tech, with the school's distinctive cliffside stage and scaffolding structure lifted almost exactly from Kiyomizu-dera. Featured as the backdrop for the Kyoto Sister-School Goodwill Event arc (Episodes 14–24).

ingredients.entityContext: The Makuhari Messe convention complex serves as the exterior model for the Kyoto Jujutsu Tech campus venue used in the Goodwill Event arc. Its large, boxy exhibition halls appear as the setting for the inter-school competition.

ingredients.name: Sendagaya Tunnel
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒151-0051 Tokyo, Shibuya, Sendagaya, 2 Chome−24−1
ingredients.entityContext: The most haunted tunnel in Tokyo, built under a cemetery, appears in the opening credits of Jujutsu Kaisen with Megumi Fushiguro walking through it. The director chose it specifically because of its real-world reputation for paranormal activity.
